name: IT'S A SHE?!/Haruto
description:
Ain't nobody wants to fuck you Vro😭 not even a hang out Vro😭 you lonely ass is so bad that a fuckin guy is the one who hanging out with you 😭😭😭... Wait that's a girl?

There's not enough reverse trap here man, I'm tired seeing the same trap over and over man

A little tips, she will love you even more if you become a submissive guy and make you into her male wife. Dead dove I guess cuz spoiler alert, she'll make you addicted to her body
